EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS FILED BY DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

LAW AND MOTION 301, JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT HAS SHOWN THAT PLAINTIFF DOES NOT HAVE EVIDENCE TO SHOW CONSTRUCTIVE NOTICE. EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS AS TO OTHER CITY ORDINANCE ARE SUSTAINED AS TO OTHERS OVERRULED.
